title: Nested blockquotes lose paragraph breaks
body:
Parsing a blockquote nested inside another blockquote (e.g. '> > paragraph one\n> >\n> > paragraph two') collapses the two paragraphs into a single

instead of preserving the blank-line separation.

title: Add support for strikethrough (~~text~~)
body: GFM-style strikethrough using double tildes isn't recognized by text() at all; it's rendered as literal tildes. Would like this added as an inline element similar to how emphasis is handled.

title: setUrlsLinked(false) still autolinks bare URLs inside link reference definitions
body: Even after calling setUrlsLinked(false), a bare URL appearing inside a reference-style link definition's title text still gets turned into a clickable link, which contradicts the documented behaviour of that setter.

title: Large documents are slow due to per-line array rebuilding
body: textElements() explodes the whole document into a $lines array up front and linesElements() appears to do a lot of array copying per block. On a ~5000 line markdown file parsing takes noticeably longer than expected for a single-pass parser.
